name: Takachiho Co.,Ltd.
summary: Takachiho Co.,Ltd. engages in the wholesale and retail of tourism souvenirs in Japan. The company provides fishing tackles and outdoor goods through retail stores; and insurance services, as well as offers gift goods. It also manufactures confectionery products and tourist souvenirs; leases real estate properties; and manages public baths and restaurants. Takachiho Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Nagano, Japan.
